ham.subject: Transaction Alert: ₹5,000 debited from your account on 15-Apr-2026
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We have processed a debit of ₹5,000 from your account on 15-Apr-2026.

Transaction Details:
- Date: 15-Apr-2026
- Amount: ₹5,000
- Reference No.: 9876543210
- Merchant: ABC Grocery

If you do not recognize this transaction, please contact our support team immediately.

Thank you for banking with us.

Best Regards,
Your Bank

spam.subject: Important: Your QuickBooks Invoice #12345 – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

This is an automated message from QuickBooks. Your invoice #12345 for the period 01-Apr-2026 to 30-Apr-2026 has been generated and is pending payment.

Invoice Amount: ₹12,500
Due Date: 30-Apr-2026

Please review the invoice details and complete the payment at the earliest to avoid any service disruptions. Click the link below to view and pay your invoice:
<URL>

If you have already paid this invoice, kindly disregard this notice.

Thank you for using QuickBooks.

Regards,
QuickBooks Support Team
